"'''Section 223'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] by the pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]<ref name="GG9" /> [[Minga (music)|minga]]<ref name="Genre" /> [[Band/Legends|musical group]] [[The Emperor's New Clothes]] from their album ''[[Artistic Integrity]]'', which was considered the band's newest release<ref name="GG9" /> at some point during the period of [[Time/Legends|time]] between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' is set in the [[Time/Legends|time period]] between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Those battles are dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively, by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', which also establishes the Battle of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] as the final event before the beginning of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> Like the rest of The Emperor's New Clothes' work, "Section 223" was approved by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Section 223" was mentioned ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a [[1993]] supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann]].<ref name="GG9" />
